title: Applied the autonomy-era rename across remaining surfaces
summary: Applied the autonomy-era rename across remaining surfaces. The customer-engineering function lead is canonically Cadence; the Vanta CHRO is canonically Talia Kessler. Surfaces updated: briefings 007, 008, 010, 011, 012, 013, 014; briefings/index.html; ledger/index.html; customers/vanta.html; about/index.html; limitations/index.html; recruiter/plan.html; the homepage feed and ticker; the synthetic-employee dataset under console/data/. Briefing 014's §04 section is reframed as the Cadence sub-agent registration (D-243); the conversation slot that previously held a rename exchange now holds the eval-set runner wiring conversation (D-249) which is the substantive autonomy-era decision from the same fortnight. D-099 in the ledger is removed; the entry-count moves from 99 to 98 and the gap is intentional. The four briefing colophons added in commit fde185d are removed entirely.
